TH_PATCHOULI-STRIKE_GOLD.title: Gold Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-STRIKE_WOOD.title: Wood Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-STRIKE_WATER.title: Water Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-STRIKE_FIRE.title: Fire Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-STRIKE_DIRT.title: Earth Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-DEFEND_SUN.title: Sun Defend
TH_PATCHOULI-DEFEND_LUNAR.title: Lunar Defend
TH_PATCHOULI-SELECT_GOLD.title: Endless Treasure
TH_PATCHOULI-SELECT_LUNAR.title: Moonlit Bathing
TH_PATCHOULI-SELECT_ARMOR.title: Eternal Undeath
TH_PATCHOULI-ENHANCEMENT.title: Enhancement
TH_PATCHOULI-ENHANCEMENT.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all corresponding [gold]Elements[/gold] and increase this card's numbers by that amount.
For multi-[gold]Element[/gold] cards, the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] amount is based on the smallest count among your owned [gold]Elements[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORMATION.title: Transformation
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORMATION.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] other [gold]Elements[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] this card into a Spell Card.
Each point of Energy the transformed card costs requires 1 corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] from this card. For each point of Energy the exhausted card costs, reduce this card's own corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] by 1. Unused [gold]Elements[/gold] are not refunded.
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_ELEMENT.title: Gold Element
TH_PATCHOULI-WOOD_ELEMENT.title: Wood Element
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELEMENT.title: Water Element
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_ELEMENT.title: Fire Element
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_ELEMENT.title: Earth Element
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_ELEMENT.title: Sun Element
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_ELEMENT.title: Lunar Element
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_REFINEMENT.title: Element Refinement
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_REFINEMENT.descript:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Gain a corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] equal to 3 times the Exhausted card's Energy cost. If it has no corresponding [gold]Element[/gold], gain that many random [gold]Elements[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SUPERME_ALCHEMY.title: Supreme Alchemy
TH_PATCHOULI-SUPERME_ALCHEMY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of [gold]cards in hand[/gold], then add an equal number of [gold]Transmuted Elements{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_TRANSMUTATION.title: Element Transmutation
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_TRANSMUTATION.descr:
Gain {Power:diff()} of a chosen [gold]Element[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_APPLY.title: Element Application
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_APPLY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a chosen [gold]Element[/gold] to one of your [gold]cards in hand[/gold]. If it already has an [gold]Element[/gold], gain {IfUpgraded:show:its cost|1} of that same [gold]Element[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_APPLY.selectionScre: Select a [gold]card in hand[/gold] to add the chosen [gold]Element[/gold] (only mod cards).
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOKBIND.title: Bookbinding
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOKBIND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to one of your [gold]cards in hand[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOKBIND.selectionScreenPro: Select a [gold]card in hand[/gold] to add [gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SUMMER_RED.title: Summer Red
TH_PATCHOULI-SUMMER_RED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
Whenever you play a card with [red]Fire Element[/red], return this card to your hand (except copies of the same name).
TH_PATCHOULI-SPRING_WIND.title: Spring Wind
TH_PATCHOULI-AUTUMN_EDGE.title: Autumn Edge
TH_PATCHOULI-AUTUMN_EDGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
End your turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-WINTER_ELEMENT.title: Winter Element
TH_PATCHOULI-DOYOU_SPEAR.title: Earth Spear
TH_PATCHOULI-DOYOU_SPEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUMMER_FLAME.title: Summer Flame
TH_PATCHOULI-SUMMER_FLAME.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
If the enemy has [gold]Ignite[/gold], apply {Cards:diff()} additional [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-CONDENSED_BUBBLE.title: Condensed Bubble
TH_PATCHOULI-STICKY_BUBBLE.title: Sticky Bubble
TH_PATCHOULI-FLASH_OF_SPRING.title: Flash of Spring
TH_PATCHOULI-FLASH_OF_SPRING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-AUTUMN_BLADES.title: Autumn Blades
TH_PATCHOULI-AUTUMN_BLADES.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} time(s).
This card's damage is increased by [gold]Gold Element[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERY_ANGLE_SHOT.title: Every Angle Shot
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERY_ANGLE_SHOT.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deal bonus damage once for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-FIVE_SEASON.title: Five Seasons
TH_PATCHOULI-FIVE_SEASON.description: For each [gold]Element[/gold] you have, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-FALL_SLASHER.title: Hanging Sword
TH_PATCHOULI-FALL_SLASHER.description: This turn, whenever you play a card, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_GREEN.title: Static Green
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_GREEN.description: At the end of your turn, if you played no more than 5 cards this turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_FLARE.title: Royal Flare
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_FLARE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [purple]Curse[/purple] and [red]Status[/red] cards you have.
For each card [gold]Exhaust[/gold]ed, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-RING_OF_AGNI.title: Ring of Agni
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_CITY.title: Emerald City
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_CITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal equal damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIAMOND_HARDNESS.title: Diamond Hardness
TH_PATCHOULI-DIAMOND_HARDNESS.descriptio:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
|}At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-WIPE_MOISTURE.title: Wipe Moisture
TH_PATCHOULI-WIPE_MOISTURE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
TH_PATCHOULI-TRILITHON_SHAKE.title: Trilithon Shake
TH_PATCHOULI-TRILITHON_SHAKE.description:
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {Cards:diff()} times your current [gold]Block[/gold].
Lose all [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-GREEN_STORM.title: Green Storm
TH_PATCHOULI-GREEN_STORM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+2|} times.
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+2|} [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SILENT_SELENE.title: Silent Selene
TH_PATCHOULI-SILENT_SELENE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If you haven't played any [gold]Attack[/gold] cards this turn, double the effect of this card.
TH_PATCHOULI-METAL_FATIGUE.title: Metal Fatigue
TH_PATCHOULI-METAL_FATIGUE.description:
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to your [gold]Gold Element[/gold] count.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SILVER_DRAGON.title: Gold Sign [Silver Dragon]
TH_PATCHOULI-SILVER_DRAGON.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Strength[/gold] affects this card {Cards:diff()} times more.
TH_PATCHOULI-AKIBA_SUMMER.title: Fire Sign [Akiba Summer]
TH_PATCHOULI-JELLYFISH_PRINCESS.title: Water Sign [Jellyfish Princess]
TH_PATCHOULI-DELUGE_FORTY_DAY.title: Sign Two [40-Day Deluge]
TH_PATCHOULI-DELUGE_FORTY_DAY.descriptio: At the start of your turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Freeze[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-PRINCESS_UNDINE.title: Water Sign [Undine Princess]
TH_PATCHOULI-PRINCESS_UNDINE.description: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Water Spirit[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_SPIRIT.title: Water Spirit
TH_PATCHOULI-AGNI_RADIANCE.title: Fire Sign [Agni's Radiance]
TH_PATCHOULI-AGNI_RADIANCE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
This card's damage is increased by the total [gold]Ignite[/gold] stacks on all enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-AGNI_SHINE.title: Fire Sign [Agni's Shine]
TH_PATCHOULI-AGNI_SHINE.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all [gold]cards in hand[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-BURY_IN_LAKE.title: Water Sign [Lake Burial]
TH_PATCHOULI-BURY_IN_LAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If the [gold]Exhaust[/gold]ed card has [blue]Water[/blue]/[red]Fire[/red] Element, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}/deal {Cards:diff()} bonus damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-SYLPHY_HORN.title: Wood Sign [Sylphy's Horn]
TH_PATCHOULI-SYLPHY_HORN.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
For each [gold]Skill[/gold] drawn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-LAZY_TRILITHON.title: Earth Sign [Lazy Trilithon]
TH_PATCHOULI-LAZY_TRILITHON.description:
Apply 1 [gold]Slow[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Multiply your [gold]Block[/gold] by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELMO_EXPLOSION.title: Sign One [St. Elmo's Explosion]
TH_PATCHOULI-ELMO_EXPLOSION.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
For each card you have with [red]Fire Element[/red] (anywhere), deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} bonus damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-PAGE_STORM.title: Page Storm
TH_PATCHOULI-PAGE_STORM.description: Whenever a card changes its pile, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-MANA_STORE.title: Mana Store
TH_PATCHOULI-MANA_STORE.description:
Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}.
Each time this card is played, reduce its numbers this turn by 1.
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE.title: Patchouli
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_STRIKE.title: Book Strike
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_STRIKE.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]deck[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_WALL.title: Knowledge Wall
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_WALL.description: At the end of your turn, for each card in your hand, reduce damage taken by {Cards:diff()} until your next turn starts.
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_MOUNTAIN.title: Book Mountain
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_MOUNTAIN.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Increased by {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each card in your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_BITE.title: Book Bite
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_BITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card's damage increases by {Cards:diff()} each time it is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed.
Enemy loses maximum HP equal to unblocked damage dealt.
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_LIBRARY.title: Static Library
TH_PATCHOULI-REST.title: Rest
TH_PATCHOULI-REST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]hand[/gold] this turn.
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-DEEP_KNOWLEDGE.title: Deep Knowledge
TH_PATCHOULI-CLOUD_FORM.title: Cloud Form
TH_PATCHOULI-CLOUD_FORM.description: Whenever you are attacked, if your [gold]draw pile[/gold] is not empty, discard the top card of your [gold]draw pile[/gold] and prevent the damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-UNHURRIED.title: Unhurried
TH_PATCHOULI-UNHURRIED.description: Whenever your [gold]draw pile[/gold] is empty, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATERTIGHT.title: Watertight
TH_PATCHOULI-WATERTIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to (unblocked damage dealt)/3 cards.
TH_PATCHOULI-CHARGE.title: Charge
TH_PATCHOULI-CHARGE.description:
Your next Attack card deals triple damage.
Whenever this card is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_GRAB.title: Knowledge Grab
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_GRAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
You gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-POWER_THROUGH.title: Power Through
TH_PATCHOULI-POWER_THROUGH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add 2 [gold]Overdraft[/gold] cards to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-OVERDRAFT.title: Overdraft
TH_PATCHOULI-OVERDRAFT.description: Whenever you draw this card, gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-BACKUP.title: Backup
TH_PATCHOULI-BACKUP.description: Choose a [gold]card in hand[/gold]. Add {Cards:diff()} copies of it into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LIBRARY_MANAGER.title: Librarian
TH_PATCHOULI-LIBRARY_MANAGER.description: At the start and end of your turn, choose up to {Cards:diff()} [gold]cards in hand[/gold] to gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LEARN_LIMITLESS.title: Learn Limitless
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORM.title: Transform
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your [gold]Elements[/gold], then gain that many random [gold]Elements[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-WEEKLY_GIRL.title: Weekly Girl
TH_PATCHOULI-WEEKLY_GIRL.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} of the next [gold]Element[/gold] in order ([orange]Sun[/orange] -> [purple]Lunar[/purple] -> [red]Fire[/red] -> [blue]Water[/blue] -> [green]Wood[/green] -> [gold]Gold[/gold] -> [brown]Earth[/brown]).
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PERIOD.title: Elemental Periodicity
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PERIOD.description: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count decreases, gain {Cards:diff()} of the next [gold]Element[/gold] in order ([gold]Gold[/gold] -> [green]Wood[/green] -> [blue]Water[/blue] -> [red]Fire[/red] -> [brown]Earth[/brown] -> [orange]Sun[/orange] -> [purple]Lunar[/purple] -> [gold]Gold[/gold]).
TH_PATCHOULI-UNPREDICTABLE.title: Unpredictable
TH_PATCHOULI-UNPREDICTABLE.description: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, set its Energy cost to 0 before it is played for the first time this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-WEAK_WITCH.title: Weak Witch
TH_PATCHOULI-WEAK_WITCH.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Frail[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_SEA.title: Vast Books
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_SEA.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] and put them on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
If your [gold]draw pile[/gold] has more cards than your [gold]discard pile[/gold], set their Energy cost to 0 before they are played for the first time.
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOK_SEA.selectionScreenPro: Select cards to put on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MANAGER.title: Element Manipulation
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MANAGER.description: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count changes, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-DREAM_MAKE.title: Dream Transmutation
TH_PATCHOULI-DREAM_MAKE.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Relics[/gold].
Each time this card is played, double its Energy cost for the remainder of combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PREDICT.title: Element Prediction
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PREDICT.description: Next turn, gain {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Elements[/gold] and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_MAGIC.title: Double Spellcasting
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_MAGIC.description: This turn, when you play a card, play it {Cards:diff()} extra time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-SEVEN_WITCH.title: Witch of the Seven Stars
TH_PATCHOULI-SEVEN_WITCH.description:
At the start of your turn, for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Whenever you gain an [gold]Element[/gold], reduce this card's Energy cost by 1.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MAGICIAN.title: Elemental Magician
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MAGICIAN.descriptio: Cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] cost 1 less Energy for each corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOKWORM_WITCH.title: Bookworm Witch
TH_PATCHOULI-BOOKWORM_WITCH.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERYTHING_CIRCLE.title: Eternal Cycle
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERYTHING_CIRCLE.descripti: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-BODY_CREATE.title: Body Creation
TH_PATCHOULI-BODY_CREATE.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} [gold]cards in hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Base Body[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-BASIC_BODY.title: Base Body
TH_PATCHOULI-BASIC_BODY.description: When this card is [gold]Transformed[/gold], its Energy cost is considered 1.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_SHOT.title: Element Shot
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal bonus damage once for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-KILL_RAT.title: Exterminate Rats
TH_PATCHOULI-KILL_RAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All enemies take {Cards:diff()} times more damage this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-USE_DEMON.title: Command Demon
TH_PATCHOULI-USE_DEMON.description: Choose a [gold]card in hand[/gold], play it and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
TH_PATCHOULI-GREEN_FLASH.title: Green Flash
TH_PATCHOULI-GREEN_FLASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Cards:diff()} time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-SLEEP_PARTY.title: Sleep Party
TH_PATCHOULI-SLEEP_PARTY.description:
All players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain bonus for each surviving player.
TH_PATCHOULI-SKILL_SHOP.title: Skill Department Store
TH_PATCHOULI-SKILL_SHOP.description:
Other players lose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold], then choose a [gold]Skill[/gold] card from all [gold]Skills[/gold] and add it to hand; its Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
You gain all [gold]Gold[/gold] lost by other players.
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_SEVEN_GROUP.title: Double Seven Combo
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_SEVEN_GROUP.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For every 7 Attack cards in your deck, double this card's damage.
For every 7 Skill cards in your deck, double this card's Block.
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK.title: Forbidden Book
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} random cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}to your hand, and their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNFLARE.title: Sunflare
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNFLARE.description: All enemies lose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn, and you gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_BURST.title: Sun Burst
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_BURST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold].
If this kills an enemy, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE_LIGHT.title: Sunrise Light
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE_LIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Whenever you gain [orange]Sun Element[/orange], play this card automatically from your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_DROP.title: Lunar Drop
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_DROP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_SHADOW.title: Lunar Shadow
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_SHADOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Block[/gold] does not expire at the start of your next turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_CLOAK.title: Lunar Cloak
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_CLOAK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Return a card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_CLOAK.selectionScreen: Select a card to return to hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_MASK.title: Lunar Mask
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BLEES.title: Lunar Blessing
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BLEES.description:
Choose: gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold], {Cards:diff()} [purple]Lunar Element[/purple], or {Power:diff()} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
You may choose up to 3 times, with one extra choice per [purple]Lunar Element[/purple] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-RAINBOW_SHOT.title: Rainbow Shot
TH_PATCHOULI-RAINBOW_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce this card's Energy cost by 1 for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_WITCH.title: Red Hall Witch
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_WITCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Heal HP equal to damage dealt.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_TO_MOUNTAIN.title: Earth to Mountain
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_TO_MOUNTAIN.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For every {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] you have, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_BURY.title: Rapid Burial
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_BRAIN.title: Red Hall Brain
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_BRAIN.description:
Increase your hand size by {Cards:diff()}.
At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-WITCH_TEA.title: Witch Tea Party
TH_PATCHOULI-WITCH_TEA.description:
Fill your potion slots with random potions.{IfUpgraded:show:
At end of combat, increase your potion slot limit by 1.|}
TH_PATCHOULI-EVADE_WORLD_GIRL.title: Knowledge & Reclusive Girl
TH_PATCHOULI-EVADE_WORLD_GIRL.descriptio: Whenever a card changes its pile, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-UNKNOWN_MAGIC_ELEMENT.title: Unknown Magic Element
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_LIGHT.title: Bright Moonlight
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_LIGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ENDLESS_MAKE.title: Endless Forge
TH_PATCHOULI-ENDLESS_MAKE.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Base Body[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-MAGIC_EXPAND.title: Magic Expansion
TH_PATCHOULI-BLOOD_CIRCLE_MAKE.title: Blood Circuit Forge
TH_PATCHOULI-BLOOD_CIRCLE_MAKE.descripti: You may play cards even without enough {Energy:energyIcons()}, but lose HP equal to {Cards:diff()} times the card's base Energy cost.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHLOGISTIC_RAIN.title: Water-Fire Sign [Phlogistic Rain]
TH_PATCHOULI-PHLOGISTIC_RAIN.description: At the start of your turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-LAVA_CROMLECH.title: Fire-Earth Sign [Lava Cromlech]
TH_PATCHOULI-LAVA_CROMLECH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
This turn, convert attack damage you block into [gold]Ignite[/gold] dealt to the attacker.
TH_PATCHOULI-CIRCULAR_LAVA_BELT.title: Fire-Earth Sign [Circular Lava Belt]
TH_PATCHOULI-CIRCULAR_LAVA_BELT.descript: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], apply equal [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-HEPHAESTUS_HAMMER.title: Gold-Fire Sign [Hephaestus's Hammer]
TH_PATCHOULI-HEPHAESTUS_HAMMER.descripti: At end of combat, randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_DIAMOND_RING.title: Sun-Lunar Sign [Royal Diamond Ring]
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_DIAMOND_RING.descript:
This combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all your cards.
Whenever a card enters your hand, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
TH_PATCHOULI-TIDAL_FORCE.title: Lunar-Water Sign [Tidal Force]
TH_PATCHOULI-TIDAL_FORCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Double this card's damage for every 100 max HP the enemy has.
TH_PATCHOULI-MERCURY_POISON.title: Gold-Water Sign [Mercury Poison]
TH_PATCHOULI-MERCURY_POISON.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, apply equal [gold]Poison[/gold] to the enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALOPOLIS.title: Earth-Gold Sign [Emerald Megalopolis]
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALOPOLIS.descrip: Whenever you lose [gold]Block[/gold], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHOTOSYNTHESIS.title: Sun-Wood Sign [Photosynthesis]
TH_PATCHOULI-PHOTOSYNTHESIS.description:
At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Regeneration[/gold] equal to your maximum {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Whenever you lose HP, remove all [gold]Regeneration[/gold] and this effect.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNSHINE_REFLECTOR.title: Lunar-Gold Sign [Sunshine Reflector]
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNSHINE_REFLECTOR.descript: Whenever you play a card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to half its base Energy cost.
TH_PATCHOULI-SATELLITE_HIMAWARI.title: Lunar-Wood Sign [Satellite Himawari]
TH_PATCHOULI-SATELLITE_HIMAWARI.descript: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-DAMOCLES_SWORD.title: Sun-Gold Sign [Damocles Sword]
TH_PATCHOULI-DAMOCLES_SWORD.description: Whenever you play a card, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALITH.title: Earth-Gold Sign [Emerald Megalith]
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALITH.descriptio: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_LUNAR_TOGETHER.title: Lunar-Sun Sign [Sky Measurement]
TH_PATCHOULI-ROOT_ACTIVATION.title: Wood-Water Sign [Root Activation]
TH_PATCHOULI-ROOT_ACTIVATION.description: You may play all [gold]cards in hand[/gold] for free this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-GINGER_GUST.title: Gold-Earth Sign [Ginger Gust]
TH_PATCHOULI-GINGER_GUST.description: If you have [gold]Strength[/gold], multiply your [gold]Strength[/gold] by {Cards:diff()}; otherwise, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK.title: Earth-Lunar Sign [Lunar Grimoire]
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK.description: At end of combat, choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from all piles in this combat to add to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_REAPER.title: Gold-Lunar Sign [Lunar Reaper]
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_REAPER.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
For each enemy this kills, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
All cards with the same name gain {Cards:diff()} permanent damage this run.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENTAL_HARVESTER.title: Gold-Wood Sign [Elemental Harvester]
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENTAL_HARVESTER.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 3 random [gold]Element[/gold] cards to your hand; their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-FOREST_BLAZE.title: Wood-Fire Sign [Forest Blaze]
TH_PATCHOULI-FOREST_BLAZE.description: Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies, plus bonus for each surviving enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_WIND.title: Fire-Water Sign [Fire Wind]
TH_PATCHOULI-ELMO_PILLAR.title: Fire-Gold Sign [St. Elmo's Pillar]
TH_PATCHOULI-ELMO_PILLAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, bonus {Damage:diff()} if enemy intends to attack.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies, bonus {Cards:diff()} if enemy does not intend to attack.
TH_PATCHOULI-SQUARE_RING_SWORD.title: Sun-Earth Sign [Square Ring Sword]
TH_PATCHOULI-SQUARE_RING_SWORD.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies N times. Each time, halve damage and repeat until damage < 1.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_FIRE.title: Lunar-Fire Sign [Hazy Moon Fire]
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_FIRE.description: For each debuff on the enemy, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE.title: Fire-Sun Sign [Dawn Rising]
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE.description: At the start of your turn, trigger all enemies' [gold]Ignite[/gold] {Cards:diff()} time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELF.title: Water-Wood Sign [Water Elf]
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELF.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Water Spirit[/gold] to hand.
Each time this card is played, increase its numbers by 1 this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_SILVER.title: Wood-Gold Sign [Golden Thread, Silver Branch]
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_SUN.title: Gold-Sun Sign [Gilded Eclipse]
TH_PATCHOULI-GROUND_TO_SKY.title: Wood-Earth Sign [Leyline Apex]
TH_PATCHOULI-GROUND_TO_SKY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
All enemies lose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-AWAKE_EDICT.title: Wood-Sun Sign [Awakening Edict]
TH_PATCHOULI-AWAKE_EDICT.description:
Heal {Cards:diff()}% of max HP.
Excess healing increases max HP.
TH_PATCHOULI-WHISPER_ROOT.title: Wood-Lunar Sign [Whispering Root]
TH_PATCHOULI-WHISPER_ROOT.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), then set their Energy cost to 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-STAR_PREDICTOR.title: Water-Sun Sign [Nova Predictor]
TH_PATCHOULI-STAR_PREDICTOR.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-SWAMP.title: Water-Earth Sign [Mismatching Swamp]
TH_PATCHOULI-SWAMP.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Slow[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
For the next {Cards:diff()} turns, [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on those enemies are doubled.
TH_PATCHOULI-SECRET_CHAMBER.title: Water-Gold Sign [Secret Chamber]
TH_PATCHOULI-SECRET_CHAMBER.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {Cards:diff()} bonus damage per {IfUpgraded:show:stack|debuff} on the enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHLOGISTIC_PILLAR.title: Phlogistic Pillar
TH_PATCHOULI-HYDROGENOUS_PROMINENCE.desc:
Remove all [gold]Freeze[/gold] from enemies, then deal damage equal to {Cards:diff()} times the [gold]Freeze[/gold] stacks to ALL enemies.
Deal bonus damage once for each [blue]Water Element[/blue] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-NOACHIAN_DELUGE.title: Earth-Water Sign [Noachian Deluge]
TH_PATCHOULI-NOACHIAN_DELUGE.description: Discard all [gold]cards in hand[/gold]; for each, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Freeze[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_MOON.title: Water-Lunar Sign [Mirror Flower, Water Moon]
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_MOON.description: This turn, when you play a card, add {Cards:diff()} copies of it with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-ASHES_RISE.title: Fire-Wood Sign [Ashen Rise]
TH_PATCHOULI-ASHES_RISE.description: Restore all enemies to full HP, then apply equal [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ETHERAL_FIRE.title: Earth-Fire Sign [Ethereal Fire]
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_HANG_SKY.title: Sun-Fire Sign [Blazing Sun]
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_HANG_SKY.description:
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to (total [gold]Ignite[/gold] on all enemies)/{Cards:diff()}.
Whenever this card is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-BURN_LUNAR.title: Fire-Lunar Sign [Full Moon Edict Burn]
TH_PATCHOULI-BURN_LUNAR.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
If enemy has [gold]Ignite Mark[/gold], apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite Mark[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-GROUND_MOUTHPIECE.title: Earth-Sun Sign [Mantle Mouthpiece]
TH_PATCHOULI-GROUND_MOUTHPIECE.descripti: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] and {Cards:diff()} from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] and add them to hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-GROUND_MOUTHPIECE.selection: Select cards to add to hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-GOOD_UP.title: Earth-Wood Sign [Thriving]
TH_PATCHOULI-GOOD_UP.description: Remove all debuffs from yourself; for each, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_DIRT.title: Lunar-Earth Sign [Stagnant Moon]
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_DIRT.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed, reduce its Energy cost by {Cards:diff()} this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-TIRED.title: Fatigue
TH_PATCHOULI-TIRED.description:
Put this card on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
While this card is in your hand, whenever you play more than 5 cards in a turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that card; if you play more than 9 cards in a turn, gain 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 less card each turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-CRAZY.title: Madness
TH_PATCHOULI-CRAZY.description: Whenever you draw this card, play all [gold]cards in hand[/gold] randomly and increase their Energy cost by 1 this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-PATCHOULI_FORM.title: Mukyu Form
TH_PATCHOULI-PATCHOULI_FORM.description: Damage you deal and take is reduced by {Cards:diff()}%.
TH_PATCHOULI-PATCHOULI_GO.title: Patchouli♂ GO!
TH_PATCHOULI-WESTERN_TOUHOU.title: Western Eastern Magician
TH_PATCHOULI-WESTERN_TOUHOU.description:
Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-GENSOKYO_RADIO.title: Gensokyo Radio
TH_PATCHOULI-GENSOKYO_RADIO.description: Choose a [gold]card in hand[/gold], add copies of it to other players' hands{IfUpgraded:show:, and its Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn|}.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHER_STONE.title: Fire-Water-Wood-Gold-Earth Sign [Philosopher's Stone]
